changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Long Awaited Trip"

TextENGNew: ...He stayed home all day that day.
Laying on the tatami floor, occasionally looking out the window or messing with his cell phone. Not doing much of anything.
He wasn't drinking alcohol like usual... but that didn't mean things were safe.
So, after finishing the dishes, I carefully chose my words and decided to speak with him.
``U-umm... Takumi-kun?``
He responded in a weak voice without turning around.
I was a little disappointed that he didn't turn around... but no, it's better this way.
These days, it's been painful seeing him face to face.

``Um, well...@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3003. I borrowed a magazine from a coworker yesterday, and it had an article about a place called Hinamizawa.@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3004. It was closed off after a disaster a long time ago... but they recently re-opened it.``
``S-so...?@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3006. People say it's a frightening place and try to avoid it, but in reality it's a nice quiet place surrounded by nature.``
``The scenery is wonderful, and it's far less crowded than the major tourist attractions. Plus, the fresh air is delicious.``
......Oh, I see.

``T-Takumi-kun... You told me that before you like places in nature without a lot of people, right?@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3009. And I have a long holiday coming up next week... so I was thinking... we could go together?``
``I-I think it'll make for a really nice change of pace.@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3011. ...D-don't you... think so?``
The next moment.
His body suddenly started to rise up.
When I saw it, I immediately held my breath and started to brace myself.
``Uh... umm, I-I'm sorry!@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3013. I-I wasn't trying to force something on you, Takumi-kun...``
...@k...Driving...
...Are we taking your car? Then, it's fine...
``...@k@vS20/42/VTT_towada3016.Y-yeah...``
After hearing that, I was able to release a little of the tension and catch my breath.
Then he got up, walked right past me, slipped on his shoes, and went off somewhere.
Yeah, let's go.
To Hinamizawa...
